channel.title: Frontity for news website
channel.description:
Hi guys! I want to create a CMS for a news website similar to https://www.laiguana.tv/, but, I don't know if it's a good idea... I'm planning to use Wordpress as backend and news generator, and to consume with Frontity the api of Wordpress. I want to know if this deveploment is fasible.
Sorry if I was direct, I'm learning english yet :)
Thanks.

item.title: Frontity for news website
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hey @lukateric1997 welcome to Frontity!

News websites are one of the most common use cases of Frontity Framework, so it is completely feasible. I invite you to take a look at our showcase, you will see that many sites are blogs and some of them have even open sourced the theme so you can use it as a starting point.

Here you have some ideas to start from with your theme:

  • https://frontity.org/blog/introducing-frontity-chakra-theme/
  • @frontity-codenawis theme
  • Personal blog

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity for news website
item.dc:creator: lukateric1997
item.description:
Hi guys! I want to create a CMS for a news website similar to https://www.laiguana.tv/, but, I don’t know if it’s a good idea… I’m planning to use Wordpress as backend and news generator, and to consume with Frontity the api of Wordpress. I want to know if this deveploment is fasible.

Sorry if I was direct, I’m learning english yet

Thanks.

Read full topic
